commands.name: copy-log
commands.description: Copies a reference to the log under another job

options.name: --prepend
options.description: The header line(s) to add to the log

options.name: --format-headers
options.description: Causes header lines to be formatted along with log lines [default: False]

options.name: --prefix
options.description: The prefix to add to each line.

options.name: --escaping
options.description: The escaping rules to apply to the line text

options.name: --format
options.description: The format string to replace token in

options.name: --replacement-token
options.description: The replacement token in the format string [default: $(Line)]

options.name: --parent-job-name
options.description: The name or id of the parent job

options.name: --start-line
options.description: The start line of the logs

options.name: --end-line
options.description: The end line of the logs

options.name: --start-line-pattern
options.description: The start line regex pattern of the logs

options.name: --end-line-pattern
options.description: The end line pattern of the logs

options.name: --source-id
options.description: The id of the source task logs to copy

options.name: --target-id
options.description: The id of the target task logs to create or replace

options.name: --copy-state
options.description: Whether to copy the full state of the source record [default: False]

options.name: --order
options.description: The order of the created task

commands.name: download-log
commands.description: Downloads the log to a file

options.name: --target
options.description: The target file or null to output to standard out

options.name: --prepend
options.description: The header line(s) to add to the log

options.name: --format-headers
options.description: Causes header lines to be formatted along with log lines [default: False]

options.name: --prefix
options.description: The prefix to add to each line.

options.name: --escaping
options.description: The escaping rules to apply to the line text

options.name: --format
options.description: The format string to replace token in

options.name: --replacement-token
options.description: The replacement token in the format string [default: $(Line)]

options.name: --start-line
options.description: The start line of the logs

options.name: --end-line
options.description: The end line of the logs

options.name: --start-line-pattern
options.description: The start line regex pattern of the logs

options.name: --end-line-pattern
options.description: The end line pattern of the logs

commands.name: extract-log
commands.description: Extract variables from a log file

options.name: --EnvironmentFallback
options.description: The behavior for missing values [default: Skip]

options.name: --source-id
options.description: The id of the source task logs to process

options.name: --start-line
options.description: The start line of the logs

options.name: --end-line
options.description: The end line of the logs

commands.name: gz
commands.description: Compresses the given file using gzip to the given path

options.name: --set-context
options.description: Causes task info to be set as variable so that calls to azputils in subsequent tasks use this tasks info

commands.name: reserve
commands.description: Reserve a slot for the specified task

options.name: --jobCount
options.description: The number of job slots available for reservation

options.name: --clean
options.description: Whether to clean the agent directory

commands.name: runtaskcmd
commands.description: Run command until it completes or build finishes. Also completes agent invocation task.

commands.name: synchronize
commands.description: Synchronize following steps in parallel jobs

options.name: --jobCount
options.description: The number of job slots available for synchronization (e.g. $(System.TotalJobsInPhase) )

options.name: --qualifier
options.description:
The key used to correlated between multiple synchronizations in the same job phase []
phaseId, --recordId <recordId>      The phase id (e.g. $(System.PhaseId))

options.name: --recordId-key
options.description: The build property key containing the record id to use for synchronization

options.name: --complete
options.description: Whether to complete the task referred to by the record id [default: False]

options.name: --waitOnly
options.description: Whether to only wait for the synchronization and not participate [default: False]

options.name: --parent-id
options.description: The parent id of the created record

options.name: --secrets
options.description: The secret variable names to upsert

options.name: --variables
options.description: The non-secret variable names to upsert

options.name: --variable-input-prefix
options.description: The prefix of variables to upsert

options.name: --variable-output-prefix
options.description: The prefix added to upserted variables
